infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Layal's shop uses the camera to scan clothing barcodes and capture collection photos.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Layal's shop uses your photo library so vendors can choose clothing photos to upload.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Layal's shop uses your location to show nearby fashion branches.
